appraisal_events.evidence: À la grande surprise de Mme Verdurin, il ne lâcha jamais. Il allait les rejoindre n'importe où... Swann qui ne parlait jamais de ses relations brillantes... répondit:
appraisal_events.explanation: Contrary to Mme Verdurin’s doubts, the narrator shows Swann becoming a reliable, present member of the group and poised to be useful through connections, which elevates his local standing within the Verdurin circle.

status_effects.explanation: He shifts from being a suspected flake to a dependable participant who joins the circle anywhere, signaling increased inclusion in the valued social space.
